#### Date range of interest

Records were limited to those with observation dates after `r settings$min_year`, i.e. 50 years prior to the current year. This corresponds to the timeframe for which a species would be regarded as extinct if it had no new records. This restriction also minimised the risk of comparing old records to contemporary environmental variables that may not reflect the conditions around the time an old record was collected.

`r paste0(clean_text$text[i], " ", clean_text$context_text[i])`
